name: Chocolate Mint Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Nestle Toll House Best Loved Cookies
Preparation Time: 0:10
Preheat oven to 350°F. Melt 3/4 cups of chocolate chips in a saucepan over the lowest heat. When the chips begin to melt, remove from heat; stir. Return to heat for a few seconds at a time, stirring until smooth and cool. Combine melted chocolate chips, margarine, vanilla, and egg whites in a mixing bowl. In another bowl, combine flour, remaining mint chocolate chips, sugars, baking soda, and salt. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons onto prepared baking sheets. Bake for 12 minutes or until edges are set but centers are still soft.
